page_content:
OPPORTUNITIES Internships

See http://cmns.umd.edu/undergraduate/research- internships/ and https://bsci.umd.edu/research-internships (https:// bsci.umd.edu/research-internships/)

Honors Program

Outstanding students are encouraged to apply to departmental Honors Programs. Through the Honors Programs, students will become actively involved in the ongoing scientiﬁc research at the university. Information about these honors programs may be obtained at https://bsci.umd.edu/ honors or by reaching out to BSCIque@umd.edu (bscique@umd.edu).
